description_long: This is a single-story, elongated residential house with a modern, open floor plan. The exterior features a mix of light brown and white surfaces, with large rectangular windows distributed along the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes a visible garage, multiple entry points, and a series of rooms arranged linearly, suggesting a ranch-style layout. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete. The main entryway is slightly recessed with a small set of steps leading up to it, flanked by large windows. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and functional, accessible spaces.
description: A modern, single-story ranch-style house with a flat roof, large windows, and a linear layout. The exterior is a mix of light brown and white, featuring a garage and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the house with several large windows, the main entryway with steps, and the garage on the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the garage is prominent at the far end, and the linear arrangement of rooms and windows is visible along the length.
description_view_2: This side highlights more windows and doors, with the garage now on the left and the main entryway centrally located.
description_view_3: The rear of the house is visible, showing additional windows and a more private facade, with the garage at the far end.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, flanked by large windows, no porch or columns
